title: HIVE Announces Quarterly Revenue of $29.2 Million, Adjusted EBITDA of $17.3 Million
text: HIVE Digital Technologies announced quarterly revenue of $29.2 million with adjusted EBITDA of $17.3 million, with an increase in Bitcoin holdings to 2,805 BTC. The company reported strong operational metrics during the quarter. HIVE mined 322 BTC during the three-month period and increased its total Bitcoin treasury holdings to 2,805 BTC. The company continues its disciplined Bitcoin accumulation strategy while simultaneously expanding its mining operations and AI infrastructure services. CEO Aydin Kilic stated that the results demonstrate the company's ability to generate strong cash flows while maintaining strategic Bitcoin reserves for long-term shareholder value creation.
